description: SessionStore.currentSessions() wraps the internal list with Collections.unmodifiableList before returning; MetricStore and TraceStore return the raw mutable list. Unifying onto a shared helper that drops unmodifiableList re-introduces session-table corruption.

findings.rationale: currentSessions wraps the field access in Collections.unmodifiableList — an extra CALL on the critical path. The other two siblings return the field directly. extra-call shape, return-value flow.
